name: Filled Artichoke Hearts
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups cooked chopped spinach, well drained
6 7 oz jars marinated whole artichoke hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. To prepare the filling, combine the minced spinach with the mayonnaise, garlic salt, and onion.
2. Refrigerate for about 1 hour so the flavors blend.
3. Drain the artichoke hearts and pat dry with a paper towel.
4. Spread the leaves around the heart to make a small indentation in the center for the filling.
5. Spoon the spinach mixture onto the artichoke hearts.
6. Refrigerate until serving time.
7. Garnish with pimiento strips, if desired, for additional color.
Makes about 30 filled hearts.
